name: 电与磁
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 物理世界 / Physical World / Physical World
curriculum_points: Students in PYP 3-4 will be able to build simple circuits using batteries, wires, and bulbs, and identify materials that are conductors or insulators of electricity.
Students in PYP 5 will be able to investigate how electricity is generated and transformed in their local environment, and propose ways to use it safely and responsibly.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
